description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:6 Docker image. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that caches the node_modules/ directory. In its script run npm install hexo-cli -g, npm install -g hexo, npm install hexo, npm install hexo-generator-feed, npm install, then hexo generate and hexo deploy. Publish the generated public/ folder as a pages artifact and configure the job to run only on the master branch using the gitlab-org runner tag.
